title: Return exit code 1 when buildah-rmi fails

comments.body: Looks like your fix is actually showing a whole bunch of bugs in our testing.  Perhaps we have to change these build tests to do  `buildah rmi -f`  Or remove the container in a separate step then the rmi
Luckily there are only 3 tests that fail.
I think the image created is not names $elsewhere, it must have a different name in storage, so we should be removing that name.
